opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There is a massive, agonizing lump on my eyelid, and it feels exactly like a shard of glass is trapped in my eye.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A painful lump on my eyelid blew up over a day and I'm scared about my eye.

symptom_narrative.onset: ~24h ago, mild then rapidly worse over 12h
symptom_narrative.character: tender lump on the eyelid margin, foreign-body/gritty feeling
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very painful, feels like glass in the eye
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: watery eye; vision seems normal; no double vision
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get blocked oil glands (blepharitis) sometimes
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: keeping the eye shut from pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has been rubbing the eye

objective_data_offered.value: tender red lump on the upper lid margin with a small yellow point, visible on video
vision seems normal; no double vision; can move the eye
